ScoutSession.title: Scout Session
ScoutSession.description: Represents a saved scout conversation or report about the player.

userId.description: The UID of the user who requested the scout session.

query.description: The particular question or initial prompt the user asked.

FaceitSyncRecord.title: Faceit Sync Record
FaceitSyncRecord.description: Represents synchronized stats and profiles fetched from the Faceit API.

username.description: The Faceit nickname/username of the player.

stats.description: Parsed lifetime stats like kd, adr, kpr, matches played.

segments.description: Details about map segments and statistics per map.

syncedAt.description: Timestamp when this record was retrieved and stored.

FaceitMatchRecord.title: Faceit Match Record
FaceitMatchRecord.description: Represents an individual historical match played by the player.

username.description: The Faceit nickname of the player.

date.description: Timestamp on when the match took place.

kills.description: Number of kills in the match.

deaths.description: Number of deaths in the match.

elo.description: The player's Elo rating at or after this match.

/scoutSessions/{sessionId}.description: Sessions and scouting reports generated by the assistant, saved by the user.

/faceitStats/{username}.description: Latest synchronized Faceit player profile and parsed statistics.

/faceitHistory/{historyId}.description: Historical log entries of synced stats over time to track rating progression.

/faceitMatches/{matchId}.description: Detailed records of individual historical FACEIT matches.
